title: Otter-Dedsafio/Nutria-dedsafio
description: Add the dedsafio otter to minecraft/Añade la nutria del dedsafio (Pon el bmorph para ser la nutria)
body: this mod is a Fan-Made and adds you to the challenge otter, you can have an otter in your minecraft,The original design of the otters made them: https://twitter.com/_thelunch     / Para poder ser la nutria tendras que instalar otro mod el bmorph
